ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java import substring from dw::core::Strings var raw = attributes.requestPath default "/" var stripLead = if (raw startsWith "/") substring(raw, 1, sizeOf(raw)) else raw var stripTrail = if ((sizeOf(stripLead) > 0) and (stripLead endsWith "/")) substring(stripLead, 0, sizeOf(stripLead) - 1) else stripLead --- if (stripTrail == "") "index.html" else stripTrail

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { app: "atelier-static", env: p('mule.env'), version: "1.0.1", time: now() as String }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var n = lower(vars.fileName) --- if (n endsWith ".html") "text/html; charset=utf-8" else if (n endsWith ".css") "text/css; charset=utf-8" else if (n endsWith ".js") "application/javascript; charset=utf-8" else if (n endsWith ".mjs") "application/javascript; charset=utf-8" else if (n endsWith ".json") "application/json; charset=utf-8" else if (n endsWith ".svg") "image/svg+xml" else if (n endsWith ".png") "image/png" else if (n endsWith ".jpg" or n endsWith ".jpeg") "image/jpeg" else if (n endsWith ".gif") "image/gif" else if (n endsWith ".webp") "image/webp" else if (n endsWith ".ico") "image/x-icon" else if (n endsWith ".woff2") "font/woff2" else if (n endsWith ".woff") "font/woff" else if (n endsWith ".ttf") "font/ttf" else if (n endsWith ".txt") "text/plain; charset=utf-8" else if (n endsWith ".map") "application/json; charset=utf-8" else "application/octet-stream"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { "Content-Type": vars.contentType, "Cache-Control": "no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0", "X-Atelier-File": vars.fileName }
